prompt: Create a luxury fashion magazine editorial diptych with exactly 2 vertical side-by-side panels separated by a thin white divider, warm beige studio interior, soft natural sunlight, minimal Mediterranean plaster walls, cream and ivory palette, high-end resort wear styling, photorealistic DSLR quality. Left panel: a tall fashion model with warm tan skin and long tousled dark brown hair, standing relaxed with hands in trouser pockets, wearing an oversized ivory blazer over a ribbed cream V-neck crop top and high-waisted pleated ivory trousers with a beige button, cropped from head to upper thighs, leaning near a ceramic vase at the lower left edge; her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque brown rectangular blur. Right panel: the same model seated or leaning in a closer three-quarter portrait, wind-swept loose hair, gold hoop earring visible, wearing a cream halter cowl-neck draped dress with deep plunging neckline and soft folds, bare shoulders and arms, warm shadow shapes on the wall behind her; her face is intentionally covered by a larger centered opaque brown rectangular blur. Use soft editorial lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy shadows, premium neutral styling, elegant composition, natural fabric texture, refined minimalism, no visible text, no logos, no extra people.
